FETS — ID & registration alignment
===================================

Before you book
- [ ] Legal name matches exactly on: exam registration, ID document, and payment profile
- [ ] You know which ID types your exam sponsor accepts (passport, national ID, etc.)

Document checks
- [ ] ID is not expired
- [ ] Name order (given / family) matches registration — hyphens and spacing count
- [ ] If you changed name legally, bring supporting documents if required by the sponsor

Photocopies
- [ ] Most sponsors require original ID — confirm; do not rely on photocopies unless explicitly allowed

At FETS
- [ ] Arrive with the same ID you used to register
- [ ] If anything looks wrong on the appointment, contact the sponsor before exam day

Support: +91 9605686000 · edu@fets.in
